headline: Canadian Copper Receives Approval Milestone for Caribou Transaction and Appoints Vice President, Projects
summary: Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - April 7, 2026) - Canadian Copper Inc. (CSE: CCI) ("Canadian Copper" or the "Company") announces it has received Lieutenant-Governor for the Province of New Brunswick approval for the Minister of Natural Resources to enter into a Limited Environmental Liability Agreement ("LELA" or "Approval Milestone") with the Company for the Caribou Complex ("Caribou"). headline: Can $3.5B Legal Bottleneck Threaten EchoStar’s $20B SpaceX Lifeline
summary: EchoStar (SATS) has pulled off the ultimate pivot. Since mid-2025, the stock has rocketed from $15 to $127 as investors treat the company as a de facto tracking stock for SpaceX’s looming $2 trillion IPO. The catalyst? A massive $20 billion spectrum deal that swapped EchoStar's debt-ridden telecom business for a seat at Elon Musk’s table.
